title: Figure 1 in Multiplex-PCR differentiation of two Hyalomma and two Haemaphysalis species (Acari: Ixodidae)
author: Hosseini-Chegeni, Asadollah
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. The dorsal morphological aspect of representative male specimens of Hyalomma anatolicum (A) and Hy. asiaticum (B) both collected from Lorestan province; white and red arrows showing position of characters cervical grooves and dorsal posterior margin of the basis capituli, respectively (size of specimens was not considered).
steps_raw: Figure 1. The dorsal morphological aspect of representative male specimens of Hyalomma anatolicum (A) and Hy. asiaticum (B) both collected from Lorestan province; white and red arrows showing position of characters cervical grooves and dorsal posterior margin of the basis capituli, respectively (size of specimens was not considered).
